ogTitle: West Lakes vs West Lakes Shore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Lakes and West Lakes Shore.
heading: West Lakes vs West Lakes Shore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Lakes, South Australia and West Lakes Shore, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Lakes has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to West Lakes Shore (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Lakes or West Lakes Shore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Lakes has a flood risk score of 22/100, while West Lakes Shore scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Lakes scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. West Lakes Shore scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Lakes or West Lakes Shore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Lakes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
